title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Melorra - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Melorra - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, Melorra in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Melorra:
Melorra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Melorra!
